global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and promotional text on a light purple background with various graphic elements.
global.main_message: Promoting exclusive new hits available tonight.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears abstract, possibly a shape or icon, with a light purple background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that is rectangular, positioned centrally, with a light purple background.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the bottom, with a light purple background.

elements.label: Small rectangular element
elements.description: A small rectangular graphic element located towards the bottom, with a light purple background.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element located towards the bottom, with a light purple background.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' in white font against a light purple background.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'StarVault' displayed prominently at the top in large, bold black font against a light purple background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' in white font on a rounded rectangular shape at the bottom.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, light purple with bold text, key elements include logo and promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main promotional text is centrally placed, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight New hits every week, StarVault, Learn more
